zh.lifeSummary: 當Lady Agnes Maxwell於1555年出生在蘇格蘭吉德布萊次爾特雷格萊斯時，她的父親John Maxwell44歲，母親Agnes Herries22歲。她於1581年8月12日之前與Sir John Charteris of Amisfield在蘇格蘭吉德布萊次爾特雷格萊斯結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和5個女兒的父母。她去世於1593年1月10日在英國蘇格蘭度福利爾享年38歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Lady Agnes Maxwell于1555年出生在苏格兰吉德布萊次爾特雷格萊斯时，她的父亲John Maxwell44岁，母亲Agnes Herries22岁。她于1581年8月12日之前与Sir John Charteris of Amisfield在苏格兰吉德布萊次爾特雷格萊斯结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和5个女儿的父母。她去世于1593年1月10日在英国苏格兰度福利爾享年38岁。

nameMeanings.name: Maxwell
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Scottish: habitational name from a place in Kelso, near Melrose in Roxburghshire, the name of a salmon pool on the Tweed near Kelso Bridge. The placename is first recorded in 1144 in the form Mackeswell ‘Mack's spring or stream’ (Old English well(a)).
Irish: adopted for Ó Meisceall, see Miskell . This surname is common in Ulster.
Jewish: arbitrary adoption of the Scottish name, or Americanized form of one or more similar (like-sounding) Jewish surnames.

variants.name: Miskell
meanings: Irish (Galway): Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó Meisceall ‘descendant of Meiscill’, a personal name of unexplained etymology. Sometimes Anglicized as Maxwell .

nameMeanings.name: Agnes
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Latinized version of the Greek name Hagnē, from the feminine form of the adjective hagnos ‘pure, holy’. This was the name of a young Roman virgin martyred in the persecutions instigated by the Roman emperor Diocletian in ad 303 . She became a very popular saint in the Middle Ages. Her name was early associated with Latin agnus ‘lamb’, leading to the consistent dropping of the initial H- and to her representation in art accompanied by a lamb. The colloquial form Annes led to some confusion with Ann(e) in earlier centuries. Frequent in the medieval period, the name was revived in the 19th century, and has been especially popular in Scotland. See also Annis .

en.lifeSummary: When Lady Agnes Maxwell was born in 1555, in Terregles, Kirkcudbrightshire, Scotland, her father, John Maxwell, was 44 and her mother, Agnes Herries, was 22. She married Sir John Charteris of Amisfield before 12 August 1581, in Terregles, Kirkcudbrightshire, Scotland. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 5 daughters. She died on 10 January 1593, in Dumfriesshire, Scotland, United Kingdom, at the age of 38.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Lady Agnes Maxwell est née en 1555, à Terregles, Kirkcudbrightshire, Écosse, son père, John Maxwell, avait 44 ans et sa mère, Agnes Herries, avait 22 ans. Elle a épousé Sir John Charteris of Amisfield avant 12 août 1581, à Terregles, Kirkcudbrightshire, Écosse. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 5 filles. Elle est décédée le 10 janvier 1593, à Dumfriesshire, Écosse, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 38 ans.

August 1581 in Terregles, Kirkcudbrightshire, Scotland Sir John Charteris of Amisfield geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 5 Töchter. Sie starb am 10. Lei sposato Sir John Charteris of Amisfield prima del 12 agosto 1581, nel Terregles, Kirkcudbrightshire, Scotland. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 5 figlie. Morì il 10 gennaio 1593, nel Dumfriesshire, Scozia, Regno Unito, all'età di 38 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Lady Agnes Maxwellが1555年にスコットランドキルククウドブリトシュアイアテレグレスで生まれた時，父John Maxwellは44歳，母Agnes Herriesは22歳であった。1581年8月12日以前にスコットランドキルククウドブリトシュアイアテレグレスでSir John Charteris of Amisfieldと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と5人の娘の親であった。彼女は1593年1月10日にイギリススコットランドダムフリーシュアイアで38歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Lady Agnes Maxwell(이)가 1555년 스컷랜드 커kc드브라이츠히르 터레글레스에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 John Maxwell(은)는 44세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Agnes Herries(은)는 22세였다. 그녀는 1581년 8월 12일 이전 스컷랜드 커kc드브라이츠히르 터레글레스에서 Sir John Charteris of Amisfield(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 다섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1593년 1월 10일 영국 스코틀랜드 드프리실르에서 38세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Lady Agnes Maxwell nasceu em 1555, em Terregles, Kirkcudbrightshire, Scotland, seu pai, John Maxwell, tinha 44 anos e sua mãe, Agnes Herries, tinha 22 anos. Ela casou-se com Sir John Charteris of Amisfield antes 12 de agosto de 1581, em Terregles, Kirkcudbrightshire, Scotland. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 5 filhas. Ela faleceu em 10 de janeiro de 1593, em Dumfriesshire, Escócia, United Kingdom, com 38 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Lady Agnes Maxwell родилась в 1555 г. в местности тирреглесь, кирккудбраицхир, Шотландия, её отцу по имени John Maxwell было 44 года, а матери, которую звали Agnes Herries, 22. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir John Charteris of Amisfield перед 12 августа 1581 г. в местности тирреглесь, кирккудбраицхир, Шотландия. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 5 дочерей. Она умерла 10 января 1593 г. в местности думфриессхир, Шотландия, Великобритания в возрасте 38 лет.

Se casó con Sir John Charteris of Amisfield antes de 12 de agosto de 1581, en Terregles, Kirkcudbrightshire, Scotland. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 5 hijas. Murió el 10 de enero de 1593, en Dumfriesshire, Escocia, Reino Unido, a la edad de 38 años.
